/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wall -fno-strict-aliasing -fwrapv -fvisibility=hidden -Wno-format-truncation -Wno-format-overflow -mfpmath=sse -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/link.d -shared  -o release/ref_gles3.so CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_draw.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_image.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_light.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_lightmap.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_main.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_mesh.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_misc.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_model.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_sdl.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_surf.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_warp.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/gl3_shaders.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/files/models.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/files/pcx.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/files/stb.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/files/surf.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/files/wal.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/files/pvs.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/common/shared/shared.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/common/md4.c.o "CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/client/refresh/gl3/glad-gles3/src/glad.c.o" CMakeFiles/ref_gles3.dir/src/backends/unix/shared/hunk.c.o  -lm -ldl -rdynamic -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,-Bstatic -lSDL2main -Wl,-Bdynamic -lSDL2
